calendar.matters:
Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to Open court, counsel appears in the courtroom. The court did not receive any notice to contest. Party states they are not contesting and that she has another matter at 9:30am. Counsel leaves at 9:02am.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance.

The unopposed motion is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order and drop a hard copy to Dept. 302.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/REQ)

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance.

Continued to February 2, 2026 on court's own motion.
